message:
Running command: head -100 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AMBA/rtl/nc_mcu_fabric.v | grep -n "input\|output\|m0\|apb\|slave"
echo "---"

echo "---"

grep -n "gpio\|GPIOA\|PADDR.*0x4000\|APB_BASE\|apb.*gpio" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v | head -30
